stemHtml:

Given:

Head Wind (HWC): 50 kt 
Fuel consumption en-route: 1800 kg/h 
Fuel consumption holding: 900 kg/h 
Suitable alternate at location: X

Calculate the contingency fuel for a commercial flight with a twin engined jet aeroplane from departure to destination: (Note: The operator is approved for the use of basic fuel scheme WITH variations)
